subcodes.title: Words directed at Mirza Muhammad 'Ali
subcodes.first_line: Inform my brother that I am not `Alí, nor is he `Umar. I am much greater than `Alí and he is much lesser than `Umar.
subcodes.first_line_orig: نه تو آن عمر هستی که امر باین عظمت را بلند کنی و نه من آن علی هستم که از دست تو در نخلستان گریه کنم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
